sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a suspicious script execution in temporary folders or folders accessible by environment variables
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a suspicious script executions from temporary folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects javaw.exe in AppData folder as used by Adwind / JRAT
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tom Ueltschi, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects shell spawned from Java host process, which could be a sign of exploitation (e.g. log4j exploitation)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious DNS Query for IP Lookup Service APIs
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects DNS queries for IP lookup services such as "api.ipify.org" originating from a non browser process.
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Copy From or To System Directory
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects a suspicious copy operation that tries to copy a program from system (System32, SysWOW64, WinSxS) directories to another on disk.
Often used to move LOLBINs such as 'certutil' or 'desktopimgdownldr' to a different location with a different name in order to bypass detections based on locations.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Tim Shelton (HAWK.IO), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Device Retrieving External IP Address Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY External IP Lookup - checkip.dyndns.org
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET POLICY External IP Lookup - checkip.dyndns.org"; flow:established,to_server; http.host; content:"checkip.dyndns.org"; fast_pattern; depth:18; endswith; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2021378; rev:5; metadata:created_at 2015_07_02, former_category POLICY, updated_at 2020_09_14;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Device Retrieving External IP Address Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain in DNS Query (checkip .dyndns .org)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO External IP Lookup Domain in DNS Query (checkip .dyndns .org)"; dns.query; content:"checkip.dyndns.org"; nocase; bsize:18; classtype:external-ip-check; sid:2043238; rev:1; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2023_01_09, deployment Perimeter, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2023_01_09;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: INDICATOR-COMPROMISE IP address check to dyndns.org detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS ( msg:"INDICATOR-COMPROMISE IP address check to dyndns.org detected"; flow:to_server,established; http_header; content:"Host|3A 20|checkip.dyndns.org",fast_pattern,nocase; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop,ruleset community; service:http; classtype:misc-activity; sid:26353; rev:3; )

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386 Mono/.Net assembly, for MS Windows
